buy_box.preference_notes: Strong Lakewood-orbit preference. Schools moderate weight (5-6yr horizon). Min 1,750 sqft (no smaller homes).

sub_areas.name: Forest Hills
sub_areas.feeder_pattern: Woodrow Wilson HS / J.L. Long MS / Lakewood Elementary
sub_areas.notes: Historic Forest Hills proper -- between Garland Rd and Edmondson, west of Buckner. Lakewood-side, larger lots than Hollywood Heights, walkable to WRL and Arboretum. Slowing market = buyer leverage. Note: Redfin loosely tags adjacent subdivisions (Wyrick Estates, Lake Park, etc.) as 'Forest Hills'; the bbox here matches the *true* historic boundary, so some Redfin-tagged 'Forest Hills' listings will land in Lake Park Estates instead.

sub_areas.name: Hollywood Heights / Santa Monica
sub_areas.feeder_pattern: Woodrow Wilson HS / J.L. Long MS / Lakewood Elementary
sub_areas.notes: Conservation district (exterior changes need review). Walking distance to lake, Lakewood Country Club, Lakewood Shopping Center. 47% YoY $/sqft is a yellow flag (thin sample).

sub_areas.name: M Streets / Greenland Hills
sub_areas.feeder_pattern: Woodrow Wilson HS / J.L. Long MS / Mockingbird Elementary
sub_areas.notes: Tier S because of Mockingbird Elementary feeder (one of DISD's two strongest elementaries alongside Lakewood Elem). Conservation district. Walkable to Greenville Ave restaurants/nightlife. Less 'lake-centric' than Forest Hills/Hollywood Heights but the school anchor outranks the location-feel critique.

sub_areas.name: Lakewood proper
sub_areas.feeder_pattern: Woodrow Wilson HS / J.L. Long MS / Lakewood Elementary
sub_areas.notes: Median \$1.6M means typical listings are out of band, but smaller/older homes do appear at \$1.0-1.1M. Lakewood Elementary feeder is the strongest in DISD. Walking distance to White Rock Lake and Lakewood Country Club. Conservation district overlay in some pockets.

sub_areas.name: Lakewood Hills
sub_areas.feeder_pattern: Woodrow Wilson HS / J.L. Long MS / Lakewood Elementary
sub_areas.notes: North of Mockingbird Ln, south of NW Hwy, east of Abrams. Adjacent to Lakewood proper with similar character. Lakewood Elementary feeder. Listings at the bottom of the range (1,800-2,300 sqft, original condition) can fit \$1.0-1.1M.

sub_areas.name: Wilshire Heights
sub_areas.feeder_pattern: Woodrow Wilson HS / J.L. Long MS / Mockingbird Elementary
sub_areas.notes: Tier S because of Mockingbird Elementary feeder. Median \$1.5M is well above buy box, but smaller historic homes can appear at \$1.0-1.1M. 97% YoY $/sqft pop is thin-sample noise -- verify against same-block comps.

sub_areas.name: Vickery Place
sub_areas.feeder_pattern: Woodrow Wilson HS / J.L. Long MS / Lipscomb-Geneva Heights-Mockingbird (split)
sub_areas.notes: Urban-walkable, M Streets-adjacent. Median \$1.21M is above buy box but original-condition or smaller historic homes appear at \$1.05-1.1M. School zoning splits across Lipscomb / Geneva Heights / Mockingbird Elem -- verify per address. +30% YoY is real momentum.

sub_areas.name: Lakewood Heights
sub_areas.feeder_pattern: Woodrow Wilson HS / J.L. Long MS / Mockingbird Elementary (partial) / Lakewood Elementary (partial)
sub_areas.notes: Promoted from watch to Tier S. Median \$1.2M is just over the buy box, but Lakewood Heights' 1930s-original homes (~900 of them, many renovated) appear at \$1.0-1.1M for the smaller/less-updated end. Partial Mockingbird Elementary feeder + partial Lakewood Elementary -- verify per address.

sub_areas.name: Hillside
sub_areas.feeder_pattern: Woodrow Wilson HS / J.L. Long MS / Lakewood Elementary
sub_areas.notes: West of White Rock Lake, mostly mid-century ranches built 1951-early 1960s. Mature trees, serene streetscape. Median ~\$1.3M but original-condition ranches can fit \$1.0-1.1M. Lakewood Elementary feeder.

sub_areas.name: Caruth Terrace
sub_areas.feeder_pattern: Woodrow Wilson HS / J.L. Long MS / Mockingbird Elementary
sub_areas.notes: Tier S because of Mockingbird Elementary feeder. Small enclave east of Greenville Ave, between Mockingbird Ln (N) and Belmont/Vanderbilt (S). Listings typically start ~$650K and reach $1M+ for renovated mid-century. 66 DOM = some negotiation room. Recent +36% YoY $/sqft is a thin-sample yellow flag -- verify against same-block comps before paying ask.

sub_areas.name: Lake Park Estates
sub_areas.feeder_pattern: Bryan Adams HS / Hill MS / Hexter Elementary
sub_areas.notes: North of historic Forest Hills, includes Lake Park Estates proper plus the newer adjacent subdivisions Redfin loosely tags as Forest Hills (Wyrick Estates, Eastwood Estates, Forest Hills Estates). Mid-century modern, large lots up to 0.5ac. Range $700K-$1.2M+. Bryan Adams feeder is the school weak point but lake-adjacency and lot premium offset for non-school-driven buyers.

sub_areas.name: Moss Farm
sub_areas.notes: Strongest momentum in the screen (+26% YoY). RISD upside. Less Lakewood feel.

sub_areas.name: Merriman Park Estates
sub_areas.feeder_pattern: Lake Highlands HS / Forest Meadow JH / Merriman Park Elementary (A-)
sub_areas.notes: Hot market (22 DOM). RISD with A- elementary. Larger ranch-style homes, many being updated.

sub_areas.name: Casa Linda
sub_areas.feeder_pattern: Bryan Adams HS / Hill MS / Hexter Elementary
sub_areas.notes: Best Lakewood-orbit value play. <1mi to White Rock Lake. Niche #11 in Dallas. School pattern is the weak link (Bryan Adams).

sub_areas.name: Lake Highlands Estates
sub_areas.feeder_pattern: Lake Highlands HS / Lake Highlands JH / Lake Highlands Elementary
sub_areas.notes: Top-of-band entry. Premium LH pocket. RISD optionality if schools become priority.

sub_areas.name: Old Lake Highlands
sub_areas.feeder_pattern: Bryan Adams HS / Hill MS / Hexter Elementary
sub_areas.notes: Best $/sqft value in screen. 93 DOM = real negotiation leverage. Bryan Adams feeder is the school weak point.

sub_areas.name: L Streets
sub_areas.feeder_pattern: Lake Highlands HS / Lake Highlands JH / Lake Highlands Elementary
sub_areas.notes: At $1.0-1.1M you're 1.7-2x area median. Resale pool thinner. RISD optionality if you want zero-work turnkey.

sub_areas.name: Town Creek
sub_areas.notes: Range mid-$600s to $900s. RISD at lower entry than Merriman Park or LH Estates.

sub_areas.name: Little Forest Hills
sub_areas.feeder_pattern: Bryan Adams HS / Hill MS / Hexter Elementary
sub_areas.notes: Promoted from watch to Tier A. Quirky/artsy pocket east of White Rock Lake near the Arboretum. Median $480K means most listings are below buy box, but renovated cottages and new construction in the upper $700s to $1M+ do exist -- pull the trigger when one appears. Lake-adjacent character similar to Casa Linda but more eccentric. Bryan Adams feeder is the school weak point (same as Casa Linda and Old Lake Highlands).

watch_areas.name: Lochwood
watch_areas.notes: East-side WRL adjacent. Range to $1.06M. Watch for upper-tier listings.

watch_areas.name: Mockingbird Meadows
watch_areas.notes: 147 DOM = very slow. Either stale market or hidden opportunity.

bbox_disclaimer: Bounding boxes are approximate and intended for v0 filtering. Refine using DCAD GIS shapefile data when polygon precision matters.
